name: claudia
description: The agent-kitchen forge and the applied skills it produces.

plugins.name: agent-kitchen
plugins.description: The kitchen that designs Claude Code artifacts: forge (skills, hooks, rules, CLAUDE.md, workflows), ingest, harvest (mine transcripts for the failures that earn artifacts), and harness-audit. The reusable design layer.

plugins.name: skills
plugins.description: Applied skills: shadcn-tailwind, design-engineer, speed-daemon, quality-audit, saltintesta, flavored-md, zoom-out, changelog. Each earned against a named model and checked by a runnable probe.
